name: kc-pv-dg
description: Scripts to verify subprojects without hardware

scripts.dev: npm run test:dzx && npm run test:pwa && npm run build:pwa && npm run dev:pwa
scripts.test:e2e:pwa: cd PWA && CI=1 npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e:gateway:pwa: cd PWA && CI=1 npm run test:e2e:gateway
scripts.verify: npm run check:dzx && npm run test:dzx && npm run test:pwa && npm run build:pwa && npm run test:e2e:pwa && npm run test:e2e:gateway:pwa
